mapper.select: SELECT M.*, D.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, U.UNI_NAME AS uniName FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
SELECT M.*, D.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, U.UNI_NAME AS uniName FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO WHERE STATUS = 'N'
SELECT D.DEPT_NO, D.DEPT_NAME, M.MEM_NAME AS memName FROM DEPARTMENT D LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON D.DEPT_NO = M.DEPT_NO
